name: House of Caesar, LLC
description: Insurance submission for House of Caesar, LLC, a restaurant in Miami, FL with over 20 years of operations, seeking coverage for D&O, Employment Practices Liability, Fiduciary Liability, and Crime.

coverages.description: Coverage for fiduciary responsibilities related to employee benefit plans
Coverage for losses from crime including employee dishonesty

exposures.description: Restaurant operations with 30 full-time employees and $2,500,000 in annual revenues
